_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ tracks:
     last_version: 0.4.0
     name: upstream
     patches: null
-    release_inc: '1'
+    release_inc: '2'
     release_repo_url: git@github.com:ros-industrial-release/ros_industrial_cmake_boilerplate-release.git
     release_tag: :{version}
     ros_distro: rolling

@@ -77,6 +77,31 @@ tracks:
     vcs_type: git
     vcs_uri: https://github.com/ros-industrial/ros_industrial_cmake_boilerplate.git
     version: :{auto}
+  jazzy:
+    actions:
+    - bloom-export-upstream :{vcs_local_uri} :{vcs_type} --tag :{release_tag} --display-uri
+      :{vcs_uri} --name :{name} --output-dir :{archive_dir_path}
+    - git-bloom-import-upstream :{archive_path} :{patches} --release-version :{version}
+      --replace
+    - git-bloom-generate -y rosrelease :{ros_distro} --source upstream -i :{release_inc}
+    - git-bloom-generate -y rosdebian --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro}
+      -i :{release_inc} --os-name ubuntu
+    - git-bloom-generate -y rosdebian --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro}
+      -i :{release_inc} --os-name debian --os-not-required
+    - git-bloom-generate -y rosrpm --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro} -i
+      :{release_inc} --os-name fedora
+    - git-bloom-generate -y rosrpm --prefix release/:{ros_distro} :{ros_distro} -i
+      :{release_inc} --os-name rhel
+    devel_branch: master
+    name: upstream
+    patches: null
+    release_inc: 0
+    release_repo_url: null
+    release_tag: :{version}
+    ros_distro: jazzy
+    vcs_type: git
+    vcs_uri: https://github.com/ros-industrial/ros_industrial_cmake_boilerplate.git
+    version: :{auto}
   melodic:
     actions:
     - bloom-export-upstream :{vcs_local_uri} :{vcs_type} --tag :{release_tag} --display-uri

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Remove release_repo_url (#1)

It was incorrect and unnecessary.

files.patch:
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ tracks:
     name: upstream
     patches: null
     release_inc: '1'
-    release_repo_url: git@github.com:ros-industrial-release/ros_industrial_cmake_boilerplate-release.git
+    release_repo_url: null
     release_tag: :{version}
     ros_distro: humble
     vcs_type: git
@@ -149,7 +149,7 @@ tracks:
     name: upstream
     patches: null
     release_inc: '2'
-    release_repo_url: git@github.com:ros-industrial-release/ros_industrial_cmake_boilerplate-release.git
+    release_repo_url: null
     release_tag: :{version}
     ros_distro: rolling
     vcs_type: git
